pageContext.name: Black Adam Group (1) LED Mini-Poster Light
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Brandlite are proud to present the Black Adam Group (1) LED Mini-Poster Light.  DC Comics LED Illuminated Poster Signs to bring your favorite character to life with brightly lit inkjet print, embedded in a solid slimline Acrylic (PMMA) body. The high-end posters illuminate the graphic and have a unique 'neon-style' edge glow that adds a magic atmosphere to any room in the house!
